action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py still checks retrieval before loading the submitted checkpoint, so submitting checkpoints/ctc.pt would evaluate the old retrieval baseline rather than the newly trained CTC model. Analysis: the CTC checkpoint contains type='ctc' and requires a matching CTCModel definition/decoder inside predict.py. Decision: replace predict.py with a dispatching version that first loads the checkpoint, runs CTC decoding when type=='ctc', and only uses retrieval for non-CTC checkpoints; then submit checkpoints/ctc.pt immediately due to the very small remaining time budget.
